parameters:
This is the Village Chief's house. It's a mansion so large it's excessive for an old
man living alone. When we were children, my siblings and I, and Mana too, were
allowed to live here.
↑North Forest There is a monster ruin deep in the forest, do not enter

This is the only bathhouse in the village. Village residents can enter for free, so
you can always clean your body!

...But no matter when I come, it's never very crowded. Does everyone not really want
to take baths? ...Especially Dario, or Dario...

This is the only inn in the village. Since there are hardly any guests, it also
serves as a tavern most of the time. My little sister Elly works here as a waitress.

Elly's service seems to be popular with the old men who drink here, and she's
apparently thriving as the poster girl... but since my sister hates it when I come in
as a customer, I've never actually seen her in action.

This is Dario's family field. Unlike me, Elly, and Mana, he was born in this village.
His family has apparently been entrusted with this field for generations, but...
Right now, there aren't any crops planted at all. I hope Dario is doing okay...

The field at Dario's house has become completely overgrown... When you have enough
time... Try to do something about it when you have time in the morning...
// 進行度1朝のみ、場所移動不要
-----その場のキャラの吹き出しを消す---------
現在天候のコモンイベント実行
BGM音量を50までフェードアウト
完了までウェイト = false
Whoa...what a terrible state... Dario, how long has he been neglecting this field...

Weeds are growing thickly here and there in the field. It seems it's been left to run
wild because the owner is away...
\SE[1]...Oh, \n[1], it seems you've noticed the pitiful state of this field as well.
Yes...this is awful. Has Dario been leaving this field unattended all this time?

\SE[5]That's right...ever since that lad was taken away by the lord, he's been made to work
over there, staying overnight... Poor thing, he can't even come home...
That's terrible...! No wonder he can't manage the field...!
\SE[6]Exactly... Now, \n[1], there's something I'd like to ask of you......
Of course, Village Chief! I'll clean up this field in Dario's place!
\SE[2]Hoh hoh hoh... That's a great help. I know it'll be tough, but do your best.

...Alright! For the village, and for Dario who's still working hard for us even
now...! I'm not very used to farm work, but I'll give it a try!
完了までウェイト = true
一括セルフスイッチ操作

Pulling out weeds and withered crops, carefully tilling the soil... I worked my hands
silently, trying to restore the field to its former beautiful state......

Alright, that should do it... At least it looks much better now. I just hope Dario
can see it soon...

It's gotten somewhat clean, but... We can't plant the crops until Dario comes back.
All we can do now is wait for him.

This is the training scarecrow I've been hitting since I was a kid. Hmm, seeing it
again after so long, it looks really small... If I swung my sword at it now, it would
definitely break...
BGM音量を50までフェードアウト
Huh, it's locked? Is Dario not home?
skit fadeIn ダリオ t center 60 255 easeInOut

One of our childhood friends lives in this house―Dario...a large, strong young man
with a bold personality. He's careless about his appearance and looks middle-aged at
first glance...but he's actually our age.

He's one of my few close friends, and we've been together since we were kids. Me and
Mana, Elly and Dario. The four of us have gotten along well in this village, which
has no other children.

When we were kids, we could get along without thinking about anything...but as we
grew up, the two of us started seeing Mana as a member of the opposite sex, and
things got a little tense between us over her.

But now...with Mana far away in the Royal City, maybe we can get along like we used
to...? That's what I thought when I came to visit Dario's house, but......

...Seems like he's out, what a shame. I didn't see him in the fields outside either,
so where could he be...? I guess I'll try somewhere else for now......
BGM音量を90までフェードイン
Dario doesn't seem to be here. Let's check the other places first.

Oh, if it isn't \n[1]! Long time no see...! I thought you'd never come back to a
village like this!

Since you've come all this way, you should stay a while. Hoho... It's just a village
full of old men and women, with nothing much to offer...

\n[1]... Since you've finally come back, you should properly greet everyone. Everyone
was lonely without you...

It's locked... This is the tool shop, right? Why would they close up shop at this
hour?
Hmm, maybe they went out somewhere? It might be open at night. I'll come back later.
It might be open at night. Let's come back another time.
This road ahead leads to the Royal City, but I can't go back now...

I don't want to leave this village right now. I'm worried about Elly. That girl's
boyfriend... I need to see for myself if Dario can really make my sister happy.
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = South_Orig
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = South_Orig
Before heading out of the village, let's go around and greet everyone first...
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = North_Orig
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = North_Orig

I really want to greet the Village Chief too, but... Let's go see Dario and Elly
first. I want to talk properly with the two of them first........

Oh, if it isn't \n[1]-kun! You've returned from the Royal City, haven't you? How was
the journey? Did you have fun?

Haha! That's great to hear! Ever since you were kids, you and Mana-chan wanted to
become adventurers...! I'm happy you were able to achieve your dreams!

This village is as peaceful as ever...so much so that they didn't even need to send
me all the way from the next town. Well, that's why you should leave it to me and
take a rest!

Hah... I'm tired. It's about time to wrap up, just a little more to go... You should
head home soon too, \n[1]-kun.

Hah... Having to stand here for the village's sake even when it's about to rain...
that's the tough part of this job... You should head home before you catch a cold,
\n[1]-kun.

...Oh, if it isn't \n[1]-kun? You've returned from the Royal City, haven't you? How was
it, your adventure? Did you enjoy it?

I see, that's good to hear. ...Oh dear, my apologies, but we're in the middle of
important work right now. Let's talk again another time when you're free.
Hmm... yes, yes...... here you go...... hmm, ugh......
Whew...I'm busy........ Huh? What's up, \n[1]!? Long time no see, how've you been!?

I'd love to chat more with you too, but... Right now, we're in the middle of some
important work. Sorry, but let's talk another time when I'm free!
...Hup! G-guh, nngh...m-my back...! T-this is nothing...!
...? What, you...\n[1]? Hah, you actually managed to come back, huh?

You forgot the debt you owe for being raised here and left the village, and now you
have the nerve to come waltzing back... Tch! Get lost! I haven't forgiven you, you
know!

Huh? What do you want, \n[1]? What business do you have with me? I'm not interested in
you, get lost already!
